isMember.description: Whether the current user is a member

isBot.description: Whether message was sent by a bot

botAppId.description: Bot app ID when sent by bot

actions.description: Interactive action buttons for bot messages

UnreadCounts.description: Map of channel IDs to unread message counts

alreadyMember.description: Whether the user is already a workspace member

get.description: Redirects to a pre-signed download URL for the attachment.
Returns all workspaces the authenticated user is a member of.

200.description: List of workspaces with user roles

post.description: Creates a new workspace and makes the authenticated user the owner.

delete.description: Deletes a workspace. Only the workspace owner can delete.

get.description: Returns all channels the user is a member of in this workspace.

post.description: Creates a new channel. Only admins can create private channels.

403.description: Only admins can create private channels

get.description: Returns all public channels in the workspace with membership status.

schema.description: Set to 'true' to include archived channels

parameters.description: Set to 'true' to include archived channels
parameters.name: includeArchived

200.description: List of public channels with membership info

get.description: Returns the IDs of channels the user has starred.
Returns all non-default per-channel notification preferences for the current user.

200.description: Map of channel IDs to notification levels

get.description: Returns the notification preference for a specific channel. Defaults to 'all'.

put.description: Sets the notification preference for a specific channel. Setting to 'all' removes the override.

post.description: Joins a public channel.
Leaves a channel the user is a member of.

get.description: Returns all members of a channel.

post.description: Adds a user to a private channel. Requires channel creator or workspace admin role.

400.description: Target user is not a workspace member

delete.description: Removes a user from a private channel. Cannot remove the channel creator.

patch.description: Updates a channel's description/topic. Any channel member can update.

post.description: Archives a channel, making it read-only. Requires workspace admin/owner role.
Unarchives a channel, restoring normal functionality. Requires workspace admin/owner role.
Stars a channel for the current user. Requires membership.

delete.description: Removes a star from a channel for the current user.

post.description: Marks all messages in the channel as read for the authenticated user.
Moves the read position to just before a specific message, making it and all subsequent messages appear unread.

messageId.description: Message ID to mark as unread from

unreadCount.description: Number of unread messages after marking

get.description: Returns paginated messages in a channel.

post.description: Sends a message to a channel.

get.description: Returns messages surrounding a specific message, useful for scrolling to a message.
Returns paginated replies to a message thread.

post.description: Creates a reply in a message thread.

400.description: Cannot reply to a reply or invalid attachment IDs

post.description: Pins a message in a channel. Any channel member can pin.

delete.description: Unpins a message from a channel. Any channel member can unpin.

get.description: Returns the number of pinned messages in a channel.
Returns all pinned messages in a channel.

post.description: Shares a message from another channel into this channel as a quoted block with an optional comment.

403.description: Channel is archived or user not a member of source channel

post.description: Saves a message for later reference. Private to the current user.

delete.description: Removes a message from saved items.

400.description: Validation error or channel is archived

get.description: Returns all members of the workspace with their roles. Optionally filter by display name.

schema.description: Filter by display name (case-insensitive prefix match)

parameters.description: Filter by display name (case-insensitive prefix match)
parameters.name: q

patch.description: Updates a workspace member's role. Requires admin permissions.

delete.description: Removes a member from the workspace. Requires admin permissions.

post.description: Gets an existing DM channel with the specified user, or creates one.

400.description: User is not a workspace member

get.description: Returns all DM channels for the authenticated user in this workspace.
Returns all invites for the workspace. Requires admin permissions.

post.description: Creates a new workspace invite link. Requires admin permissions.

delete.description: Revokes a workspace invite. Requires admin permissions.

get.description: Returns unread message counts per channel for the authenticated user.

get.summary: Get all unread messages across channels

200.description: All unread messages grouped by channel

get.description: Returns all online users in the workspace.
Full-text search across messages in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new group DM with the specified members, or returns an existing one with the same members.

200.description: Existing group DM with same members

get.description: Returns all group DM channels for the authenticated user in this workspace.

post.description: Adds a new member to an existing group DM.

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user from the group DM.

patch.description: Updates the display name of a group DM.

get.description: Returns all saved messages for the current user in this workspace.
Returns IDs of all saved messages for the current user.

403.description: Not a channel member or channel archived

get.summary: Get draft for a channel or thread

get.description: Returns all threads the current user is participating in (authored or replied to).
Returns files shared in workspace messages, with optional filtering by channel and category.
Returns all available slash commands (built-in + bot-registered) for the workspace.

post.description: Executes a slash command and returns ephemeral response messages.
Installs a marketplace bot into the workspace.

delete.description: Removes a marketplace bot from the workspace.

get.description: Returns listing IDs of installed marketplace bots in this workspace.
Lists all bot apps in the workspace.

post.description: Creates a new bot app. Returns the API token once.

get.description: Returns details of a bot app.

delete.description: Deletes a bot app and its associated user.

post.description: Regenerates the bot's API token. Returns the new token once.
Toggles a bot app's enabled state.

post.summary: Link GitHub App installation to workspace
post.description: Links a GitHub App installation to the current workspace.

accountType.description: GitHub account type: Organization or User

get.description: Returns the GitHub App installation linked to this workspace.
Returns the URL to start the Linear OAuth flow.

post.summary: Exchange OAuth code for Linear access token
post.description: Exchanges an OAuth authorization code for an access token and stores the connection.

redirectUri.description: Redirect URI used in the OAuth flow

get.description: Returns the Linear organization connected to this workspace.
Returns the URL to start the Sentry app installation flow.

post.summary: Exchange Sentry installation code for access token
post.description: Exchanges a Sentry app installation code for an access token and stores the connection.

get.description: Returns the Sentry organization connected to this workspace.
Returns the URL to start the Vercel integration installation flow.

post.summary: Exchange Vercel OAuth code for access token
post.description: Exchanges a Vercel integration installation code for an access token and stores the connection.

get.description: Returns the Vercel team connected to this workspace.
Returns workspace info for an invite code without accepting it.

410.description: Invite revoked, expired, or max uses reached

post.description: Accepts a workspace invite and joins the workspace.

410.description: Invite revoked, expired, or max uses reached

get.description: Returns a single message by ID.

put.description: Edits a message. Only the message author can edit.

404.description: Message not found or not yours

delete.description: Deletes a message. Only the message author can delete.

404.description: Message not found or not yours

post.description: Uploads one or more files. Max 50MB per file, max 10 files per request.
Adds or removes an emoji reaction on a message.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's display name and/or avatar.

put.description: Sets the user's custom status emoji and text with optional expiration.

post.description: Get a LiveKit token to join a huddle in a channel. Creates the room if needed.

channelId.description: Channel ID to join huddle in

200.description: LiveKit token for joining the huddle

post.description: Receives LiveKit webhook events for huddle state updates.
Send a message to a channel as a bot.

403.description: Not a channel member or missing scope

get.description: Read message history from a channel.
List channels the bot is a member of.

post.description: Join a public channel. Bots can only self-join public channels.

get.description: List members of a channel.

post.description: Add or remove a reaction on a message.

get.description: Get information about a user.

post.description: Handle a button click on a bot message. Sends interaction to bot webhook.
Registers or updates a device push token for the current user.

delete.description: Removes a device push token (e.g., on sign-out).

get.description: Returns the current user's global notification preferences.

put.description: Updates the current user's global notification preferences. Partial update via upsert.

get.description: Returns all published marketplace bot listings.
Returns a single marketplace listing by slug.

post.summary: Exchange auth code for API token
post.description: Bot server exchanges an auth code for an API token (OAuth flow).
Creates a new user API key. Returns the full token once.

get.description: Lists all API keys for the current user.
Returns metadata for a single API key.

patch.description: Updates an API key's name or scopes.

delete.description: Revokes and deletes an API key.
